name: Caprese Salad
ingredients: Tomato, Mozzarella, Basil, Olive oil, Balsamic
description: Fresh mozzarella, tomatoes, and basil drizzled with olive oil.
instructions: Step-1: Slice tomato and mozzarella; Step-2: Layer with basil; Step-3: Drizzle olive oil and balsamic; Step-4: Season with salt; Step-5: Serve fresh.

name: Pesto Pasta
ingredients: Pasta, Basil, Pine nuts, Garlic, Olive oil, Parmesan
description: Pasta tossed with basil pesto sauce.
instructions: Step-1: Cook pasta; Step-2: Blend basil, pine nuts, garlic, olive oil, Parmesan; Step-3: Toss pasta with pesto; Step-4: Serve hot; Step-5: Garnish with Parmesan.

name: Eggplant Parmesan
ingredients: Eggplant, Tomato sauce, Mozzarella, Parmesan, Basil
description: Baked eggplant slices with tomato sauce and cheese.
instructions: Step-1: Slice and roast eggplant; Step-2: Layer eggplant with tomato sauce and cheese; Step-3: Bake 25 min; Step-4: Garnish with basil; Step-5: Serve hot.

name: Mushroom Risotto
ingredients: Arborio rice, Mushroom, Onion, Garlic, Vegetable broth
description: Creamy Italian rice dish with mushrooms and Parmesan.
instructions: Step-1: Sauté onion and garlic; Step-2: Add mushrooms; Step-3: Add rice and gradually broth; Step-4: Stir until creamy; Step-5: Serve hot.

name: Minestrone Soup
ingredients: Carrot, Celery, Zucchini, Tomato, Pasta, Beans
description: Italian vegetable soup with pasta or beans.
instructions: Step-1: Sauté vegetables; Step-2: Add tomato and beans; Step-3: Add water; Step-4: Simmer 20 min; Step-5: Add pasta and cook 10 min; Step-5: Serve warm.

name: Margherita Pizza
ingredients: Pizza dough, Tomato sauce, Mozzarella, Basil
description: Pizza topped with tomato sauce, mozzarella, and basil.
instructions: Step-1: Preheat oven; Step-2: Roll dough; Step-3: Spread sauce; Step-4: Add mozzarella and basil; Step-5: Bake 12–15 min.

name: Ratatouille
ingredients: Eggplant, Zucchini, Bell pepper, Tomato, Onion, Garlic
description: Stewed French vegetables with herbs.
instructions: Step-1: Slice vegetables; Step-2: Sauté onion and garlic; Step-3: Add vegetables and cook 20 min; Step-4: Season with herbs; Step-5: Serve warm.

name: Quiche Lorraine (Vegetarian)
ingredients: Pie crust, Eggs, Milk, Spinach, Onion, Cheese
description: Savory baked tart with vegetables, eggs, and cream.
instructions: Step-1: Preheat oven; Step-2: Sauté onion and spinach; Step-3: Beat eggs with milk and cheese; Step-4: Fill crust; Step-5: Bake 30 min.

name: French Onion Soup
ingredients: Onion, Butter, Garlic, Vegetable broth, Bread, Cheese
description: Soup made with caramelized onions and broth, often topped with cheese.
instructions: Step-1: Sauté onions in butter; Step-2: Add garlic; Step-3: Add broth and simmer 20 min; Step-4: Serve with toasted bread and cheese on top; Step-5: Broil 5 min.

name: Coq au Vin (Vegetarian Adaptation)
ingredients: Mushrooms, Onion, Carrot, Garlic, Vegetable broth
description: Vegetarian version of chicken braised in wine, using mushrooms or tofu.
instructions: Step-1: Sauté onion, garlic, carrot; Step-2: Add mushrooms; Step-3: Add broth and herbs; Step-4: Simmer 25 min; Step-5: Serve hot.

name: Ratatouille Pasta
ingredients: Pasta, Eggplant, Zucchini, Tomato, Olive oil
description: Pasta tossed with ratatouille vegetables and olive oil.
instructions: Step-1: Cook pasta; Step-2: Sauté vegetables; Step-3: Add tomato sauce; Step-4: Toss pasta with sauce; Step-5: Serve hot.

name: American Veggie Burger
ingredients: Veggie patty, Lettuce, Tomato, Bun, Pickles
description: Vegetarian burger patty served in a bun with toppings.
instructions: Step-1: Cook veggie patty; Step-2: Toast buns; Step-3: Assemble burger with lettuce, tomato, pickles; Step-4: Serve with fries; Step-5: Optional: add sauce.

name: Mac and Cheese
ingredients: Pasta, Cheese, Milk, Butter, Flour
description: Pasta baked with creamy cheese sauce.
instructions: Step-1: Cook pasta; Step-2: Make cheese sauce with butter, flour, milk, cheese; Step-3: Combine pasta and sauce; Step-4: Bake optional 15 min; Step-5: Serve hot.

name: Vegetable Chili
ingredients: Kidney beans, Tomato, Onion, Carrot, Bell pepper, Spices
description: Hearty chili with beans, vegetables, and spices.
instructions: Step-1: Sauté onion and vegetables; Step-2: Add tomato and beans; Step-3: Add spices; Step-4: Simmer 20 min; Step-5: Serve hot.

name: Cornbread
ingredients: Cornmeal, Flour, Sugar, Baking powder, Milk, Oil
description: Sweet or savory baked bread made from cornmeal.
instructions: Step-1: Preheat oven; Step-2: Mix dry ingredients; Step-3: Add milk and oil; Step-4: Pour into pan; Step-5: Bake 20 min.

name: Butternut Squash Soup
ingredients: Butternut squash, Onion, Garlic, Vegetable broth, Cream
description: Creamy soup made with roasted butternut squash.
instructions: Step-1: Sauté onion and garlic; Step-2: Add squash and broth; Step-3: Simmer 20 min; Step-4: Blend until smooth; Step-5: Add cream and serve.

name: Vegan Macaroni Salad
ingredients: Pasta, Carrot, Peas, Vegan mayo, Vinegar
description: Cold pasta salad with vegan dressing and vegetables.
instructions: Step-1: Cook pasta; Step-2: Mix vegetables; Step-3: Add vegan mayo and vinegar; Step-4: Chill 30 min; Step-5: Serve cold.

name: Apple Pie
ingredients: Apples, Sugar, Cinnamon, Pie crust, Butter
description: Classic baked dessert with apples and cinnamon in a pastry crust.
instructions: Step-1: Preheat oven; Step-2: Slice apples and mix with sugar and cinnamon; Step-3: Fill crust; Step-4: Cover with top crust; Step-5: Bake 45 min.

name: Brownies
ingredients: Cocoa, Flour, Sugar, Butter, Eggs, Vanilla
description: Dense, chocolate baked squares.
instructions: Step-1: Preheat oven; Step-2: Mix butter, sugar, cocoa; Step-3: Add eggs and vanilla; Step-4: Fold in flour; Step-5: Bake 25 min.

name: Chocolate Chip Cookies
ingredients: Flour, Sugar, Butter, Egg, Chocolate chips, Baking soda
description: Classic cookies with chocolate chips.
instructions: Step-1: Preheat oven; Step-2: Cream butter and sugar; Step-3: Add egg; Step-4: Mix in flour and chocolate chips; Step-5: Bake 12 min.

name: Lemon Bars
ingredients: Flour, Sugar, Butter, Lemon juice, Eggs
description: Tangy lemon dessert with shortbread crust.
instructions: Step-1: Preheat oven; Step-2: Prepare shortbread crust; Step-3: Bake 15 min; Step-4: Mix lemon filling and pour over crust; Step-5: Bake 20 min.

name: Pancakes
ingredients: Flour, Milk, Eggs, Sugar, Baking powder
description: Fluffy breakfast cakes, often served with syrup.
instructions: Step-1: Mix ingredients into batter; Step-2: Heat skillet; Step-3: Pour batter; Step-4: Cook both sides until golden; Step-5: Serve with syrup.

name: Waffles
ingredients: Flour, Eggs, Milk, Sugar, Baking powder, Butter
description: Crisp, grid-patterned breakfast cake served with toppings.
instructions: Step-1: Mix ingredients into batter; Step-2: Heat waffle iron; Step-3: Pour batter; Step-4: Cook until crisp; Step-5: Serve with toppings.

name: Garlic Bread
ingredients: Baguette, Garlic, Butter, Parsley
description: Bread topped with garlic, butter, and herbs, baked until crispy.
instructions: Step-1: Preheat oven; Step-2: Mix butter, garlic, parsley; Step-3: Spread on sliced baguette; Step-4: Bake 10 min; Step-5: Serve warm.

name: Bruschetta
ingredients: Baguette, Tomato, Garlic, Basil, Olive oil
description: Toasted bread topped with tomatoes, garlic, and olive oil.
instructions: Step-1: Toast baguette slices; Step-2: Mix tomato, garlic, basil; Step-3: Spoon mixture on bread; Step-4: Drizzle olive oil; Step-5: Serve immediately.

name: Fettuccine Alfredo
ingredients: Fettuccine, Butter, Cream, Parmesan
description: Pasta in creamy Alfredo sauce with Parmesan.
instructions: Step-1: Cook pasta; Step-2: Heat butter and cream; Step-3: Add Parmesan; Step-4: Toss pasta in sauce; Step-5: Serve hot.

name: Risotto Primavera
ingredients: Arborio rice, Peas, Carrot, Zucchini, Onion, Vegetable broth
description: Creamy risotto with spring vegetables.
instructions: Step-1: Sauté vegetables; Step-2: Add rice; Step-3: Gradually add broth, stir; Step-4: Cook 20 min until creamy; Step-5: Serve hot.

name: Caprese Skewers
ingredients: Cherry tomato, Mozzarella, Basil, Olive oil, Balsamic
description: Mini skewers with mozzarella, cherry tomatoes, and basil.
instructions: Step-1: Skewer tomato, mozzarella, basil; Step-2: Drizzle olive oil and balsamic; Step-3: Season with salt; Step-4: Chill 5 min; Step-5: Serve.

name: Tiramisu (Alcohol-Free)
ingredients: Mascarpone, Ladyfingers, Coffee, Sugar, Cocoa, Cream
description: Coffee-flavored layered dessert with mascarpone cream.
instructions: Step-1: Dip ladyfingers in coffee; Step-2: Layer with mascarpone mixture; Step-3: Repeat layers; Step-4: Chill 3-4 hours; Step-5: Dust with cocoa.

name: Panna Cotta
ingredients: Cream, Milk, Sugar, Vanilla, Gelatin
description: Italian creamy dessert made with sweetened cream and gelatin.
instructions: Step-1: Heat cream, milk, sugar; Step-2: Add gelatin; Step-3: Pour into molds; Step-4: Chill 4 hours; Step-5: Serve with fruit topping.

name: Veggie Paella
ingredients: Rice, Bell pepper, Peas, Artichoke, Onion, Saffron
description: Spanish rice dish with saffron, vegetables, and spices.
instructions: Step-1: Sauté onion and bell pepper; Step-2: Add rice and saffron; Step-3: Pour water and simmer 15 min; Step-4: Add peas and artichokes; Step-5: Cook until rice tender and serve hot.

name: Gazpacho
ingredients: Tomato, Cucumber, Bell pepper, Garlic, Olive oil, Bread
description: Cold Spanish tomato and vegetable soup.
instructions: Step-1: Chop vegetables; Step-2: Blend with garlic, olive oil, and soaked bread; Step-3: Chill 2 hours; Step-4: Adjust seasoning; Step-5: Serve cold.

name: Ratatouille Tian
ingredients: Eggplant, Zucchini, Tomato, Onion, Olive oil, Herbs
description: Layered baked ratatouille vegetables, elegantly arranged.
instructions: Step-1: Slice vegetables thin; Step-2: Layer in dish; Step-3: Drizzle with olive oil and herbs; Step-4: Bake 35 min; Step-5: Serve hot.

name: Socca (Chickpea Flatbread)
ingredients: Chickpea flour, Water, Olive oil, Salt
description: Thin flatbread made from chickpea flour, often baked or grilled.
instructions: Step-1: Mix flour, water, salt into batter; Step-2: Heat skillet with olive oil; Step-3: Pour batter thinly; Step-4: Cook until golden 5 min per side; Step-5: Serve warm.

name: Ratatouille Tart
ingredients: Puff pastry, Zucchini, Eggplant, Tomato, Goat cheese
description: Tart filled with ratatouille vegetables and cheese.
instructions: Step-1: Roll pastry; Step-2: Sauté vegetables; Step-3: Layer vegetables on pastry; Step-4: Top with cheese; Step-5: Bake 25 min and serve.

name: Greek Salad
ingredients: Tomato, Cucumber, Onion, Olive, Feta, Olive oil
description: Salad with cucumber, tomatoes, olives, feta, and olive oil.
instructions: Step-1: Chop vegetables; Step-2: Mix with olives and feta; Step-3: Drizzle olive oil; Step-4: Toss gently; Step-5: Serve fresh.

name: Falafel Wrap
ingredients: Chickpeas, Garlic, Onion, Cumin, Wrap, Lettuce
description: Wrap filled with falafel, vegetables, and sauce.
instructions: Step-1: Blend chickpeas, garlic, onion, spices; Step-2: Shape into balls; Step-3: Fry until golden; Step-4: Assemble in wrap with lettuce; Step-5: Serve.

name: Baba Ganoush
ingredients: Eggplant, Tahini, Garlic, Lemon juice, Olive oil
description: Smoky eggplant dip with olive oil and seasonings.
instructions: Step-1: Roast eggplant; Step-2: Mash and mix with tahini, garlic, lemon; Step-3: Adjust salt; Step-4: Chill 15 min; Step-5: Serve with bread.

name: Shakshuka
ingredients: Tomato, Bell pepper, Onion, Garlic, Eggs, Spices
description: Poached eggs in spicy tomato and pepper sauce.
instructions: Step-1: Sauté onion, garlic, bell pepper; Step-2: Add tomato and spices; Step-3: Simmer 10 min; Step-4: Crack eggs over sauce; Step-5: Cover and cook 5 min; Serve hot.

name: Lentil Kofta Curry
ingredients: Lentils, Onion, Garlic, Tomato, Spices
description: Fried lentil balls served in spiced curry sauce.
instructions: Step-1: Cook lentils and mash; Step-2: Shape into balls and fry lightly; Step-3: Prepare tomato-onion gravy; Step-4: Add kofta to gravy and simmer 10 min; Step-5: Serve with rice.

name: Tofu Tikka Masala
ingredients: Tofu, Yogurt, Tomato, Onion, Spices, Cream
description: Tofu cooked in creamy spiced tomato sauce.
instructions: Step-1: Marinate tofu in yogurt and spices 1 hr; Step-2: Grill tofu; Step-3: Prepare tomato-onion gravy; Step-4: Add tofu and simmer 5 min; Step-5: Serve with naan.

name: Veggie Quesadilla
ingredients: Tortilla, Cheese, Bell pepper, Onion, Spinach
description: Tortilla filled with cheese and vegetables, grilled.
instructions: Step-1: Sauté vegetables; Step-2: Place tortilla in pan; Step-3: Add vegetables and cheese; Step-4: Fold and cook until golden; Step-5: Serve hot.

name: Mexican Rice
ingredients: Rice, Tomato, Onion, Garlic, Corn, Bell pepper
description: Rice cooked with tomatoes, peppers, and spices.
instructions: Step-1: Sauté onion and garlic; Step-2: Add rice and toast 2 min; Step-3: Add tomato, corn, bell pepper, water; Step-4: Cover and simmer 20 min; Step-5: Serve hot.

name: Guacamole
ingredients: Avocado, Tomato, Onion, Garlic, Lime, Cilantro
description: Creamy avocado dip with lime, onion, and herbs.
instructions: Step-1: Mash avocado; Step-2: Mix chopped tomato, onion, garlic; Step-3: Add lime juice; Step-4: Stir in cilantro; Step-5: Serve chilled.

name: Chocolate Avocado Mousse
ingredients: Avocado, Cocoa powder, Maple syrup, Vanilla
description: Creamy dessert made from blended avocado and chocolate.
instructions: Step-1: Blend avocado, cocoa, maple syrup, vanilla until smooth; Step-2: Chill 1 hr; Step-3: Serve with fruit or nuts; Step-4: Optional: garnish with berries; Step-5: Enjoy.

name: Veggie Teriyaki Stir-Fry
ingredients: Broccoli, Carrot, Bell pepper, Snow peas, Tofu, Soy sauce, Garlic, Ginger, Olive oil
description: Stir-fried vegetables coated with teriyaki sauce.
instructions: Step-1: Heat olive oil in a pan; Step-2: Sauté garlic and ginger 1 min; Step-3: Add tofu cubes and cook until lightly golden; Step-4: Add broccoli, carrot, bell pepper, snow peas and stir-fry 5–7 min; Step-5: Pour in soy sauce, toss to coat; Step-6: Serve hot with steamed rice.
